headline: Forget AI. This Biotech Stock’s Taking Off Right Now
summary: The market seems to be falling heavily out of love with the AI stocks, and for good reason: CapEx is rising at a staggering rate, especially among the Mag Seven AI darlings, all while the question marks surrounding ROIs get bigger. headline: DIA 2026 Global Annual Meeting Reimagines the World's Leading Life Sciences Forum
summary: DIA, a global non-profit organization of life sciences professionals, is bringing a fundamentally reimagined and future-focused Global Annual Meeting to Philadelphia from June 14-18 that builds on more than 60 years of scientific rigor, regulatory depth, and cross-sector collaboration while redefining how the global life sciences community connects and advances medical product development.

headline: Jim Cramer Says “I Should Have Pulled the Trigger on Regeneron”
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:REGN) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer looked at. When a caller inquired about the stock, Cramer said: Oh man, you know what? I should have pulled the trigger on Regeneron when I sat down with them at the JPMorgan conference. I realized that the Charitable Trust should have owned it. […]

headline: Eli Lilly Pipeline Updates Support Valuation Case Beyond Injectable GLP 1s
summary: Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) received a positive regulatory opinion in Europe for Olumiant in adolescents with severe alopecia areata. The company announced successful Phase 3b results for combined use of Taltz and Zepbound in psoriasis patients with obesity. Eli Lilly reported significant progress for its oral GLP-1 candidate orforglipron versus Novo Nordisk's oral semaglutide in Phase 3 trials. Eli Lilly is adding fresh momentum outside its flagship injectable GLP-1 portfolio, with new data and...
